developer_response.body:
Dear Ms. Abby Lee Miller,

We are sorry our game didn't make it to the top of the pyramid this week! 🩰

Jokes aside, we hear your frustration. You mentioned half of the game was good—we’d love the chance to fix the "trash" half and change your mind (and your friends' minds!). If you want to give us some direct notes to perfect our routine, please join our Discord at liminagames.com/tower-of-monkey

We are ready to put in the rehearsal time to make it a 5-star performance!

This is a very good game, but the one problem is the boxes are way too big so please make it to the average body size. This is a very good game, but there is some bugs that need to be fixed. I know this is in beta, so I’m giving it the good stars though because it’s actually very good. This game is an extreme workout ￼.

developer_response.body:
Hi lordoftheonionring0107,

Thank you so much for the 4 stars and for understanding that the game is still in beta! Your support really helps us keep going.

Making the body size feel more natural is a top priority for us right now, and feedback like yours confirms we need to adjust it.

We are glad you're getting an extreme workout! Regarding those bugs you mentioned: We want to squash them. Could you please share the details on our Discord at liminagames.com/tower-of-monkey? Thanks for playing!

developer_response.body:
Hi aumagrad,

"Ok" is a good start, but we want the game to be absolutely amazing for you!

We noticed you left a 3-star rating, and we would love to know what is missing. What features, updates, or fixes would it take to turn your experience from "Ok" into a "WOW" and earn those last two stars?

We are always listening to our community to make the game better. Come join our Discord at liminagames.com/tower-of-monkey and let us know your ideas!

So if you don’t know, there are mutations like low gravity that to me ruin the whole point of the game. I want to get as many trophies/crowns as possible which is what you get for getting to the top. I could have way more with people not buying low gravity because I only want clear no mutation wins. I was once at the last stage and in my opinion the most annoying stage you could get and past the annoying part then I went on the rope to find out someone put on low gravity. This game could benefit from no mutation servers for people like me who don’t want mutations because private servers don’t give trophies.

developer_response.body:
Hi Turtlemaster120,

First of all, thank you for the detailed feedback and the 4-star review! We totally understand the frustration of having your "clean run" interrupted by a sudden change in gravity—especially right at the last stage!

Pro Tip: Did you know you can actually interact with the vending machine to disable mutations for yourself? It might help make your climb a bit more consistent while we look into better ways to balance this. 

Your suggestion for "No Mutation" servers is excellent. We want the trophies to feel earned, and providing a space for "purist" climbers is a great idea that we'll discuss with the development team!

We’d love to have you in our Discord at liminagames.com/tower-of-monkey to help us refine how these servers could work. Let’s get you those 5 stars!

developer_response.body:
Hi Coolrat_vr,

You are a legend! Thank you so much for the 5-star review and for your awesome support.

It means a lot to hear that you find the game well put together. We put a lot of work into the tower, and having players like you who see the effort really keeps us going! Every game has its challenges, but we're glad you’re enjoying the climb.

We’d love to have you in our community! Come hang out with us on Discord at liminagames.com/tower-of-monkey and share your epic moments with the rest of the crew.
